$schema: clawd-on-desk theme (codex-pet compatible) — so this mascot can be imported into clawd-on-desk / codex pets and ours can import theirs
name: VERITY — Truth Hawk
author: FUTRON / VERITY
description: A silent low-poly verification hawk with a built-in V chevron. Reacts to the harness's gates.

working.note: alias of thinking until hawk-building.webp lands

generation.method: feed the clean transparent mascot PNG to Ludo animateSprite (frame_size:-9, gif:true) -> download the RGBA SPRITESHEET (webp) -> split the 4x4 grid -> assemble a transparent animated webp. NEVER the MP4 (no alpha). See memory/reference-verity-mascot-desktop-and-tetris-resources-2026-06-16.md.
